configurePresets.name: default
configurePresets.description: Matches CI: no toolchain file, all deps fetched from source. Works on any machine, no setup required.

configurePresets.name: vcpkg
configurePresets.description: Uses vcpkg-installed packages -- fast, no network needed. Requires the VCPKG_ROOT environment variable to point at your vcpkg checkout (e.g. setx VCPKG_ROOT C:\dev\vcpkg on Windows, or export VCPKG_ROOT=~/vcpkg on Linux/macOS). Deliberately does NOT hardcode a path here -- a path that's correct on one machine breaks the build for everyone else who clones this repo, which is exactly what happened before this file existed.
